name: Veal with Mushrooms and Marsala
recipeIngredient: 2 medium tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a medium skillet over high heat.
2. Season the veal with salt and pepper, then dredge in flour, patting off excess. Saute until lightly browned, about 3 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
3. Reduce the heat to medium. Add mushrooms and saute until tender, about 5 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon.
4. Add the remaining tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet; increase the heat to medium-high. Add green onions and saute until transparent, about 3 minutes.
5. Stir in tomatoes and basil; cook until most of the liquid has evaporated, 4 to 5 minutes.
6. Reduce the heat to medium. Pour in Marsala wine and simmer until thickened, about 7 minutes.
7. Return veal and mushrooms to the skillet; stir until heated through. Transfer to a warmed serving dish.
8. Add hot pasta and Parmesan cheese, then toss. Sprinkle with parsley and serve immediately.
Makes 2 servings.
